content: Jetix = solo-founder-plus-AI-agents consultancy focused on DACH Mittelstand AI-audit services
quote: Jetix is a solo-founder-plus-AI-agents consultancy focused on DACH Mittelstand AI-audit services. One founder (Ruslan, Berlin) collaborates with 11 Claude-agents across 6 internal departments to deliver AI governance audits, research, and advisory work to €10M-€500M revenue companies in Germany/Austria/Switzerland.

content: Ruslan — founder of Jetix, Berlin-based, solo operator
quote: One founder (Ruslan, Berlin) collaborates with 11 Claude-agents across 6 internal departments

content: 11 Claude-agents distributed across 6 internal departments
quote: 11 Claude-agents across 6 internal departments

content: Target client profile: €10M-€500M revenue companies in Germany/Austria/Switzerland
quote: €10M-€500M revenue companies in Germany/Austria/Switzerland

content: JETIX-FPF is the constitutional document — fixes vocabulary/roles/lifecycles/authorities/quality-gates
quote: JETIX-FPF is the constitutional document of Jetix OS — it fixes the vocabulary, roles, lifecycles, decision-authorities, and quality-gates used throughout the business.

content: Single constitutional anchor prevents multi-agent AI drift — each agent inventing its own vocabulary/categories/rationale
quote: Without a single constitutional anchor, a multi-agent AI business drifts — each agent invents its own vocabulary, each contract mixes categories, each decision loses its rationale.

content: Phase 1 = solo + 11 agents; Phase 2+ = team 5-20; Phase 3 = multi-entity federation
quote: JETIX-FPF freezes the shared conceptual backbone so the business scales coherently from Phase 1 (solo + 11 agents) к Phase 2+ (team 5-20) к Phase 3 (multi-entity federation).

content: FPF by Anatoly Levenchuk — ~62K-line pattern language, March 2026 upstream parent methodology
quote: JETIX-FPF adapts the First Principles Framework (FPF) by Anatoly Levenchuk (github.com/ailev/FPF, March 2026, ~62K lines of pattern language).

content: Internal-only adaptation — no upstream contribute-back to FPF (OQ-09 A)
quote: Internal-only adaptation (per OQ-09 A); no contribute-back upstream.

content: Tiered reader routes — different audiences load different section bundles (investor/sales-lead/client/agent/DPO/internal/steward)

note: 7 audience types with curated section paths

content: Ontological core sections (must-read for role-manifest or decision authors): §1 Target System, §2 Stakeholders, §3 Creation Graph, §5 Internal Principles, §6 Alphas, §12 Invariants
quote: Ontological core (must-read for anyone authoring role-manifests or decisions): §1 Target System, §2 Stakeholders, §3 Creation Graph, §5 Internal Principles, §6 Alphas, §12 Invariants.

content: Holon = simultaneously a whole (own boundary) and a part (nested in larger wholes) per Koestler 1967
quote: Holon | Something that is simultaneously a whole (has its own boundary) and a part (nested inside larger wholes). Koestler 1967.

content: U.Type = universal kernel-level concept (U.Role, U.System, U.Episteme) — capital-U prefix marks FPF-canonical Kernel
quote: U.Type | A "universal kind" — kernel-level concept like U.Role, U.System, U.Episteme. Capital-U prefix = FPF-canonical Kernel concept.

content: Alpha = thing whose lifecycle tracked via explicit past-participle state machine — 8 alphas in Jetix Phase 1
quote: Alpha | A thing whose lifecycle we track via explicit past-participle state machine (e.g., Client goes `lead-identified` → `qualified` → `won`). 8 alphas in Jetix Phase 1.

content: Creation Graph = 3-level directed mereological graph (target systems / creation systems / supersystems)
quote: Creation Graph | 3-level directed mereological graph showing who creates what where: target systems / creation systems / supersystems.

quote: Direction | Portfolio-of-directions pattern (Jetix innovation) — a revenue bet with its own hypothesis, kill criteria, and lifecycle. 8th alpha.

content: Inside/Outside test (3 steps: Dependency / Interaction / Emergence) applied on each Resource allocation; fail all 3 → outside Jetix
quote: Inside/Outside test (FPF A.1, 3 steps) применяется при каждом Resource allocation: 1. Dependency — removing E breaks core invariant of Jetix? 2. Interaction — E participates causal loops within Jetix's boundary? 3. Emergence — E contributes to novel collective property? Fail all → outside.

quote: Пример: life-coach agent fails all 3 tests relative to Jetix → migrated к Life-OS (per Chunk 6 Area 7 decision).

content: A.14 canonical 6 edge types: ComponentOf / ConstituentOf / PortionOf / PhaseOf / MemberOf / AspectOf
quote: A.14 canonical 6 edges: ComponentOf | Structural discrete part; ConstituentOf | Conceptual/logical part; PortionOf | Metrical measure-preserving part (μ-additive); PhaseOf | Temporal part — same carrier across interval; MemberOf | Collection membership (NOT partOf!); AspectOf | Facet/perspective of same entity

content: Jetix-introduced 4 domain-specific edge types (not in A.14 canonical): creates / operates-in / methodologically-uses / constrained-by + implicit 5th 'fills' (direction → ICP slot)
quote: Jetix-introduced 4 (domain-specific, не в A.14 canonical): creates | Creator system → target (Левенчук creation graph); operates-in | Target system → supersystem; methodologically-uses | Creator → U.MethodDescription; constrained-by | System → constraint. Plus Jetix-5th (implicit, для portfolio model): fills — direction → ICP slot (`ai-consulting-dach direction` fills `DACH Mittelstand ICP`).

content: Mereology firewall: role-method-work alignment goes to A.15 (not A.14); episteme structure ConstituentOf; identity-breaking change = MHT (B.2), not PhaseOf
quote: Firewall reminder (per A.14 normative): Если предложение о «who does what / how / when» → A.15 (Role-Method-Work Alignment). Если carrier episteme structure (pages/sections) → A.14 ConstituentOf. Если identity criteria break during change → MHT (B.2), not PhaseOf.

quote: Clients treated as peers в adult discourse. No condescension, no jargon overload, no premature lock-in. DACH Konsenskultur — decisions reached through substantive discussion + demonstrated competence, не hard sell tactics.

quote: Every client deliverable passes through A.6.B L/A/D/E structure + Bias-Audit Cycle (BA-0/BA-1/BA-3 Phase 1) + Multi-View Publication Kit (5 viewpoints для Audit SKU deliveries mandatory per OQ-04 modified).

content: L/A/D/E lane mapping: Laws (regulations grounded in public legal texts) / Admissibility (parties' acceptance criteria) / Deontics (obligations, permissions, prohibitions) / Effects (work-effects, deliverables, metrics, SLA)
quote: L — Laws | Applicable regulations, grounded в public legal texts | A — Admissibility | Parties' acceptance criteria, formal gates | D — Deontics | Obligations, permissions, prohibitions | E — Effects | Work-effects, deliverables, metrics, SLA, outcomes

content: Bias Taxonomy 5-class: REP (representation) / ALG (algorithmic) / VIS (visual) / MET (measurement) / LNG (linguistic)
quote: Bias Taxonomy 5-class (per Rec-03 + D.5): REP (representation) — demographic under-representation; ALG (algorithmic) — model architecture / training bias; VIS (visual) — UI, visualization choices; MET (measurement) — metric design, operational definitions; LNG (linguistic) — translation, terminology, framing.

content: Proposal, contract, DPA templates — all three carry full L/A/D/E Phase 1 (per Day 5-6 rollout)
quote: Operational: Proposal, contract, DPA templates — all три carry full L/A/D/E Phase 1 (per Day 5-6 rollout).

content: CP-4 Multi-View Publication mandatory: Audit SKU deliveries from first delivery onward (not pilot-only per Ruslan override OQ-04)
quote: All Audit SKU deliveries — mandatory multi-view from first delivery onward (не pilot-only, per Ruslan override OQ-04).

content: Multi-View 5 viewpoints: Executive 2-3pp / Technical 20-40pp / Governance 3-7pp / Regulatory 3-5pp / Internal-learning 5-10pp
quote: 5 viewpoints: Executive | CEO, Aufsichtsrat | 2-3 pages plain + finance; Technical | CTO, engineers | 20-40 pages specs + references; Governance | Board, risk committee | 3-7 pages governance + legal; Regulatory | BfDI, EU AI Act auditors | 3-5 pages pre-mapped EU AI Act / GDPR / DORA; Internal-learning | Jetix team | 5-10 pages FPF patterns referenced

content: CP-5 Human Approval Gate: AI-agent outputs affecting clients go through human gate (GDPR Art. 22(3) + EU AI Act Art. 14 + Jetix internal accountability)
quote: AI-agent outputs affecting clients go through human approval gate designed to satisfy (a) GDPR Art. 22(3) automated-decision safeguards, (b) EU AI Act Art. 14 human-oversight obligations (for high-risk deployments per §4.5.1), and (c) Jetix internal accountability discipline. No purely autonomous client-affecting AI decisions.

content: Gate scope 3 tiers: L1 Contractual (4h SLA) / L2 Substantive (24h) / L3 Cosmetic (no gate); default unlisted = L2 conservative
quote: | L1 — Contractual | 4h | Signed proposal, DPA signature, deliverable acceptance sign-off, pricing change >10% | L2 — Substantive | 24h | Audit recommendations, research conclusions, governance advice emails, risk assessments | L3 — Cosmetic | No gate required (J-Auto); post-hoc log only | Default rule для unlisted: escalate to L2 (conservative default).

content: Gate-keepers must satisfy Art. 22(3) + WP251rev.01 'meaningful intervention': authority AND competence to change outcome, not rubber-stamp
quote: All gate-keepers must satisfy Art. 22(3) + WP251rev.01 "meaningful intervention" criteria: authority AND competence to change outcome, not rubber-stamp.

content: Off-hours (Fri 18:00 → Mon 08:00 CET): AI outputs queue, not auto-release — Feierabend-respecting. Only 'safety' escalation pages Ruslan
quote: Off-hours (18:00 Fri — 08:00 Mon): AI outputs queue, не auto-release. Feierabend-respecting. Exception: `safety` classification escalation pages Ruslan via notification channel; Ruslan decides whether to gate off-hours.

content: Meaningful-review safeguard (WP251rev.01): max 8 L2 approvals per gate-keeper per 4-hour block; time_to_review < 60s flagged as quality risk; batch approval forbidden for L1
quote: Per WP251rev.01 "actual cognitive engagement" requirement: Maximum 8 L2 approvals per gate-keeper per 4-hour block (hard cap — prevents rubber-stamp batch approvals). Audit trail time_to_review_seconds field <60s flagged as quality-risk в FPF-Steward quarterly audit (per §5.4). Batch approval forbidden for L1 contractual; each reviewed individually.

content: Retention policy: minimum 6 months (EU AI Act Art. 12); default 6 years (HGB §257 + GDPR Art. 5(1)(e) proportionality)
quote: Minimum 6 months (EU AI Act Art. 12 event-log requirement). Default 6 years (HGB §257 commercial record retention; aligns с tax/audit record discipline per §1.3). Maximum bounded by GDPR Art. 5(1)(e) proportionality — purge approval logs containing identifying personal data at 6 years unless legal hold applies.

content: EU AI Act 4-tier taxonomy (Regulation (EU) 2024/1689): Prohibited (Art. 5) / High-risk (Annex I + Annex III) / Limited-risk Transparency (Art. 52) / Minimal-risk — plus GPAI deployer obligations (Art. 29a)
quote: EU AI Act 4-tier taxonomy (Regulation (EU) 2024/1689): 1. Prohibited (Art. 5) — social scoring, subliminal manipulation, etc. 2. High-risk (Annex I product safety + Annex III listed uses) 3. Limited-risk / transparency (Art. 52 — chatbots, emotion recognition, deepfakes, AI-generated content labelling) 4. Minimal-risk. Plus GPAI deployer obligations (Art. 29a post-Oct 2024) — Jetix как deployer of Claude triggers downstream GPAI deployer obligations.

content: Audit SKU for Mittelstand likely Annex III high-risk IF output affects employment/credit/essential-service/critical-infra decisions
quote: Audit SKU для Mittelstand | Annex III high-risk IF output materially affects employment/credit/essential-service/critical-infra decisions | Annex III 4(a) employment; 5(a)/(b) essential services; 2 critical infra

content: Aug 2, 2026 = EU AI Act high-risk obligations deadline (Arts. 9-15 + Art. 29 deployer + FRIA per Art. 29a if public-authority context)
quote: Aug 2026 high-risk obligations Aug 2, 2026 — per-engagement self-classification

content: Content-Item production (newsletter, LinkedIn, YouTube) carries Art. 52(3) AI-generated content labelling — 'generated with AI assistance' disclosure
quote: Content-Item production (Alpha 4 — newsletter, LinkedIn, YouTube) | Limited-risk / transparency — Art. 52(3) AI-generated content labelling IF published без explicit human authorship | Art. 52(3) + (4) | Disclosure "generated with AI assistance" on AI-involved content; framing-lead ensures labelling

content: Per-engagement EU AI Act self-classification before Audit SKU contract: framing-lead runs Annex III taxonomy questionnaire; documented in alphas/project/instances/<slug>/eu-ai-act-classification.yaml
quote: Per-engagement self-classification protocol: 1. Before accepting Audit SKU contract → framing-lead runs classification questionnaire against Annex III taxonomy. 2. Result documented в alphas/project/instances/<slug>/eu-ai-act-classification.yaml.

content: GDPR Art. 33(2) processor-to-controller breach notification: Jetix notifies client within 24h from confirmation (internal SLA default in DPA E-lane)
quote: Per Art. 33(2) GDPR processor obligation: Jetix notifies client controller of confirmed breach within 24h from confirmation (Jetix internal SLA; default in DPA E-lane). Jetix Art. 33(5) documentation duty begins Day 1 of first personal-data processing.

content: Write ops/gdpr-art-33-playbook.md — full Art. 33 breach framework (Phase 1 Day 10 ETA)
quote: Full Art. 33 breach framework в `ops/ gdpr-art-33-playbook.md` (Phase 1 Day 10 ETA).

content: IP-1 Role ≠ Executor strict separation: Role (obligations, method, outputs) is archetype; Executor (agent instance or human holder) is binding. Never mixed.
quote: Роль (обязанности, метод, outputs) — archetype. Executor (agent instance или human holder) — привязка. Never mixed.

content: Если говоришь роль, то за ролью скрывается метод — роль всегда связана с методом (Левенчук Методология 2025)
quote: Если говоришь роль, то за ролью скрывается метод. При разговоре о роли прежде всего разбираемся с методом: что и с чем эти роли делают.

content: Dynamic role assignment forbidden (except founder exception: Ruslan multi-role-binding)
quote: Dynamic role assignment forbidden (kroме founder exception: Ruslan multi-role-binding).

content: Anti-pattern: 'Claude Agent #3' as role name — это executor, not method signature
quote: Anti-pattern (forbidden): "Claude Agent #3" as role name (это executor, не method signature).

content: IP-2 Context is king: agent reasoning must be context-grounded. Same label ('role', 'service', 'ticket', 'evidence') carries incompatible senses across teams/standards/eras
quote: Agent reasoning must be context-grounded. Never assume globally uniform meaning. Same label ("role", "service", "ticket", "evidence") routinely carries incompatible senses across teams, standards, eras.

content: Make meaning local; make translation explicit — cross-context reuse requires explicit Bridge with CL and Loss notes, never silent
quote: A.1.1 U.BoundedContext (L.1202) — "Make meaning local; make translation explicit." (...) Cross-context reuse requires explicit Bridge (F.9) с CL (Congruence Level) and Loss notes. Never silent.

content: Phase 1 Contexts (≥3 domain families per F.1): JETIX-ops / FPF-canonical / DACH-legal / AI-industry / ШСМ-Russian (legacy reference)
quote: Phase 1 Contexts (per F.1, ≥3 domain families): 1. JETIX-ops (operational management Phase 1); 2. FPF-canonical (Левенчук ontology); 3. DACH-legal (HGB/BGB/GDPR/EU AI Act); 4. AI-industry (Anthropic, broader LLM ecosystem); 5. ШСМ-Russian (legacy pedagogy reference)

content: IP-3 Artifacts over conversations: conversation ephemeral, artifact persistent; agent reasoning externalizes through written artifact, not chat window
quote: Document the output. Conversation ephemeral; artifact persistent. Agent reasoning externalizes через письменный артефакт, не stays в chat window.

content: Systems thinking proceeds through thinking-by-modelling and thinking-by-writing — attention retained on important subjects throughout project (Левенчук)
quote: Системное мышление происходит путём мышления моделированием и письмом (с текстами на естественных языках, но с отслеживанием типов объектов и видов отношений объектов в этих текстах), поэтому внимание не только наводится на важные предметы, но и удерживается на них всё время проекта: записанное не так легко забыть в суете.

content: Every Ruslan session ends with commit (daily, weekly, monthly, quarterly artifacts); no chat-only ephemeral work for agents
quote: Every Ruslan session ends с commit (daily, weekly, monthly, quarterly artifacts). Agents output к mailboxes + scratchpads + wiki ingest — никакой chat-only ephemeral work.

content: Без внешнего к LLM контура обработки текста LLM всегда обманет. Ruslan = primary writer для critical strategic artifacts; agents support, не substitute
quote: Без внешнего по отношению к LLM контуру обработки текста — никак, LLM всегда обманет. Если и сам текст пишет LLM — исчезает «мышление письмом» как когнитивный процесс. → Ruslan primary writer для critical strategic artifacts; agents support, не substitute.

content: IP-4 Meta-agent as immune system (FPF-Steward sub-role): ontological integrity defended by dedicated meta-agent. Without immune system concepts bleed, terms drift
quote: Ontological integrity defended by dedicated meta-agent sub-role. Without immune system — concepts bleed between contexts, terms drift, alpha/entity/work-product distinctions erode.

content: FPF-Steward quarterly audit scope: alpha/WP/entity classification, past-participle, concept duplication, role-manifest integrity, direction boundaries, frontmatter, UTS review, F-G-R compliance, A.14 edges, CHR space integrity, Viewpoint Bundle correspondences, semi-annual FPF upstream sync
quote: Quarterly audit scope (expanded per Chunk 8): Alpha/WP/Entity classification sanity; Past-participle convention; Concept duplication detection; Role-manifest structural integrity; Direction-concept boundary clarity; Frontmatter schema compliance; UTS review (row additions, Bridges updates, CL re-measurement); F-G-R compliance check; A.14 edge-type verification; CHR space integrity; Viewpoint Bundle correspondences check; Semi-annual FPF upstream sync trigger (Q2/Q4 close).

content: FPF-Steward separation trigger (Phase 2b): 30+ agents OR 1+ human meta-hire OR quarterly audit burden >4h
quote: Separation trigger (FPF-Steward → separate role, Phase 2b): 30+ agents OR 1+ human meta-hire OR quarterly audit burden >4h.

content: Tiered loading strategy: Tier 1 full-text (strategy-support-analyst, knowledge-synth, meta-agent, manager in deep mode) / Tier 2 distilled essence ~2K (sales-lead, crazy-agent, manager routine) / Tier 3 reference-only ~500-1000 (Haiku agents)

Tier 2 — Distilled essence | sales-lead (Sonnet), crazy-agent (Sonnet), manager (Sonnet in routine-route mode) | ~2-3K baseline. Tier 3 — Reference-only | personal-assistant, system-admin, sales-research, sales-outreach, inbox-processor | ~500-1000 tokens baseline.

quote: Prompt-caching amortization (per Anthropic prompt-cache TTL 5min): All agents share identical D6 preamble → single cache entry amortizes across agents. Tier 1 full-text agents benefit most (~90% input-cost reduction when cache-hit).

quote: Cost projection Phase 1 with tiered loading: ~€15-25/day (reduction of ~60% vs uniform full-text). Monthly €450-750 — absorbed within P7 compute budget без revenue-target impact.

content: IP-5 Explicit alpha state transitions — past-participle discipline (MC6 + Hook 4): no gerunds, no present-continuous verbs-as-states
quote: Alpha states — past-participle глаголы (preferred) OR explicitly-scoped in-progress phase labels (narrow exception, see §5.5a). No gerunds, no present-continuous verbs-as-states.

content: Past-participle mapping: qualifying → qualified / active → activated / in progress → started / delivering → delivered / reviewing → reviewed
quote: | Неправильно (gerund/present-continuous) | Правильно (past-participle) | "qualifying" | qualified | "active" | activated | "in progress" | started | "delivering" | delivered | "reviewing" | reviewed |

content: In-progress phase exception (P1-R1-3): allow in-X/under-X compound labels ONLY with explicit semantic distinction from past-participle sibling AND both labels in same state machine
quote: Exception rule (policy decision Stage C): Past-participle discipline preferred universally; in-X / under-X compound labels ALLOWED for genuine in-progress phases where past-participle lexeme either (a) loses semantic precision (collapses distinct lifecycle stages) или (b) creates unavoidable ambiguity с terminal-done states.

content: 5 Phase 1 whitelisted in-progress exceptions: Client.in-negotiation / Project.in-follow-up / Content Item.in-review / Hypothesis.under-validation / Direction.under-validation
quote: 5 Phase 1 whitelisted exceptions (Hook 4 explicit allow-list): | Client | in-negotiation | | Project | in-follow-up | | Content Item | in-review | | Hypothesis | under-validation | | Direction | under-validation |

content: Write decisions/policy/past-participle-exceptions.md with 5 Phase 1 exceptions rationale — Phase 1 Day 7 ETA
quote: All 5 documented в decisions/policy/past-participle-exceptions.md (Phase 1 Day 7 ETA) с per-exception semantic distinction rationale.

content: State = fact, NOT process — even in-progress exception preserves fact character ('fact of being in this specific bounded-pending phase'), verifiable through checklist
quote: Semantic justification preserved: State = fact, NOT process. In-progress exception preserves fact character — "fact of being in this specific bounded-pending phase". Verifiable через checklist (e.g., in-negotiation = proposal sent + ≥1 response received + no final-decision-yet).

content: IP-6 No role left undefined: every Jetix role has structured 5-block role.md (Identity / Ontological positioning / Method / Production dependencies / Evolution)
quote: Every Jetix role has structured 5-block role.md. No "вот такой-то выполняет...". Ontologically explicit.

content: Role.md 5 blocks: Block 1 Identity (role_name, family, context, language, version) / Block 2 Ontological (archetypal_kind, scope, fpf_patterns_applied, u_type_mapping) / Block 3 Method (primary_method, deliverable_kinds, state_graph_ref) / Block 4 Production dependencies / Block 5 Evolution (current_level, autonomous, approve_required, never, direction_authority)
quote: Block 1 — Identity; Block 2 — Ontological positioning; Block 3 — Method; Block 4 — Production dependencies; Block 5 — Evolution (seniority-lite)

content: IP-7 Writing as thinking — cognitive process, writing ≠ documentation; author 'discovers' through act of writing, not pre-composes thoughts
quote: Cognitive process; writing ≠ documentation. Author "discovers" через act of writing, не pre-composes thoughts.

content: Writing quality criteria: ✅ opens new during writing / contains ontologically typed objects / reveals contradictions not visible pre-writing; ❌ fixes already-known / written 'for audience' not clarification
quote: Quality criteria: ✅ Author opens something new during writing. ✅ Text contains ontologically typed objects (roles, alphas, methods). ✅ Text reveals contradictions not visible pre-writing. ❌ Fixes already-known без new understanding. ❌ Written "for audience" не для clarification.

content: Peter Naur 'Programming as Theory Building' (1985): primary aim of programming is not to produce programs but to have programmers build theories
quote: Peter Naur "Programming as Theory Building" (1985): "The proper, primary aim of programming is not to produce programs, but to have the programmers build theories."

content: Clark & Chalmers Extended Mind (1998): cognitive processes can be offloaded to external artifacts. Git-repo = Ruslan's экзокортекс
quote: Clark & Chalmers "Extended Mind" (1998): Cognitive processes can be offloaded на external artifacts. Git-repo = Ruslan's экзокортекс.

quote: Agent cannot dynamically switch role during task execution. Role assignment happens при task creation (FPF F.6 M4 Bind/Assert), не runtime mid-task.

content: Founder exception: Ruslan multi-role-binding allowed because founder has long-term identity + commitment + skin-in-game (Taleb) — preconditions for true strategizing
quote: Founder exception: Ruslan multi-role-binding explicit (`executors/ruslan.yaml` `multi-role-binding: true` flag). Allowed because founder has long-term identity + commitment + skin-in-game (Taleb) — preconditions для true strategizing per Левенчук.

content: If you proliferate many-many roles in current multi-agent architectures, typical token-spend increase is 3-10×, and handoff failures between role-agents occur (Левенчук ailev/1795494)
quote: Если наплодить много-много ролей, то в текущих многоагентных архитектурах типичный рост расхода токенов в 3-10 раз и идут провалы при handoff между рольными агентами.

content: Role stability > role flexibility (at Phase 1 scale)
quote: → Role stability > role flexibility (at Phase 1 scale).

content: Three-layered enforcement: Layer 1 message-schema tagging (acting_as field + pre-commit hook) / Layer 2 manager monitoring (flags role-switch language) / Layer 3 FPF-Steward quarterly audit
quote: Three-layered enforcement (constitutional mechanism — D6 specifies, D8 implements): Layer 1 — Message-schema tagging (primary, mechanical). Layer 2 — Manager-agent monitoring (secondary, detection). Layer 3 — FPF-Steward quarterly audit (tertiary, strategic).

content: '5 primitives' was v1 shorthand — actually R-B analytical synthesis, not Левенчук's published taxonomy. v2 uses '5 ШСМ foundational concepts' or '5 ШСМ method-objects' consistently
quote: Note (P2-R1-2 terminology honesty — applied consistently throughout v2): "5 primitives" was v1 shorthand — actually an R-B analytical synthesis, не Левенчук's published taxonomy (per KB Section 3.1). v2 uses «5 ШСМ foundational concepts» или «5 ШСМ method-objects» consistently.

content: Role formula: Роль = signature метода × interest к системе × набор мастерства
quote: Formula: Роль = signature метода × interest к системе × набор мастерства.

content: Alpha = method-subject that can be physical object (system) or abstract object (description); enables managing creator's attention over long operation chains (Левенчук Методология 2025)
quote: Альфа — это предмет метода, который может быть и физическим объектом (системой), и абстрактным объектом (описанием). Альфа позволяет управлять вниманием создателя в ходе исполнения длинных цепочек операций.

content: FPF conflict: FPF-Spec does not preserve 'alpha' as standalone term — dispersed across U.RoleStateGraph/U.Episteme/U.System/U.Work/PhaseOf. Jetix keeps 'альфа' as Plain label + U.X as Tech twin (E.10 LEX-BUNDLE 4-register)
quote: FPF correlation ⚠ CONFLICT: FPF-Spec не preserves "alpha" as standalone term. Alpha-as-track dispersed в FPF на: U.RoleStateGraph, U.Episteme, U.System, U.Work / U.WorkPlan, PhaseOf. Jetix resolution (per KB Section 11.1 Q1): Hybrid — keep "альфа" as Plain label (pedagogical continuity с ШСМ), U.X as Tech twin.

content: Strategizing = метод выбора метода. Precedes planning and work. Used когда unclear что делать
quote: метод выбора метода — стратегирование. В условиях, когда вообще непонятно, что делать. А если непонятно, что именно делать, то и планировать ещё ничего нельзя (потребные ресурсы неизвестны), и работать нельзя.

content: СТРАТЕГИРОВАНИЕ → выбор метода → ПЛАНИРОВАНИЕ → распределение ресурсов → РАБОТА → исполнение по плану
quote: СТРАТЕГИРОВАНИЕ → выбор метода ↓ ПЛАНИРОВАНИЕ → распределение ресурсов под выбранный метод ↓ РАБОТА → исполнение по плану

content: Strategizing as trigger-driven event, NOT scheduled
quote: Strategizing as trigger-driven event, НЕ scheduled (Section 7.2).

content: 'AI agents don't strategize' hard rule (Левенчук): no identity / no commitment / no long-term memory / no skin-in-game. AI supports (SoTA harvesting, variants, critique, abductive prompting); humans select methods + accept
quote: "AI agents don't strategize" hard rule (per Левенчук, ailev/1795494): No identity / no commitment / no long-term memory / no skin-in-game. AI can support: SoTA harvesting (G.2), variant generation, critique, abductive prompting. AI cannot: method selection, final acceptance. strategy-support-analyst agent — J3 support, not J4 strategic.

content: Composition of 5 ШСМ foundational concepts: Граф Создания задаёт контекст для Ролей ↔ Стратегирование принимает решения о методах → Роли работают с Альфами → переходы фиксируются Мышлением Письмом → Экзокортекс (input для следующей сессии)
quote: ГРАФ СОЗДАНИЯ задаёт контекст для РОЛИ ← СТРАТЕГИРОВАНИЕ принимает решения о методах работают с АЛЬФЫ переходы фиксируются МЫШЛЕНИЕ ПИСЬМОМ экстернализирует все ЭКЗОКОРТЕКС (input для агентов следующей сессии)
